Meet Carla

The Calm Hands Behind Your Perfect Gown

There is a particular kind of anxiety that settles in when you are holding a gown that does not yet feel like yours — the hem is too long, the bodice does not fall the way you imagined, and the wedding is closer than you would like to admit. If that sounds familiar, you have come to exactly the right place.

Carla Westerbeck has spent more than two decades doing this work — not just the technical craft of bridal alterations, but the quieter art of making brides feel heard, understood, and absolutely certain that their gown will be ready when it needs to be. As a FIDM graduate with 24 years of couture experience and over 100 brides served annually, she brings a depth of expertise that is genuinely rare in the Sacramento market.

What brides consistently say is not just that the gown came out beautifully — it is that she understood exactly what they wanted, even when they struggled to put it into words. That intuitive understanding is what sets Keepsakes Bridal apart.

Meet Carla Book a Free Consultation
Our Story

Thirty Years of Bridal Excellence in Sacramento

Keepsakes Bridal has been a trusted name in Sacramento bridal alterations since 1994 — a legacy of impeccable fit and calming bridal care that continues to this day.

1994 — A Legacy Begins

Keepsakes Bridal was established as an alterations studio inside Bridal Mart before growing into a full bridal boutique. From its earliest days the studio became known for precision, patience, and a deeply personal approach to bridal care.

2001 — Sylvia & a New Chapter

The business was purchased by Sylvia Guraydin, who focused the studio exclusively on wedding gown alterations. It was also in 2001 that a young Carla Westerbeck, then attending fashion school, joined the team and began building her craft alongside Sylvia.

2025 — Carla Takes the Helm

After 24 years working side by side, Sylvia retired in August 2025 and entrusted Keepsakes Bridal to Carla Westerbeck. Now the owner, Carla carries forward the same tradition of impeccable fit and calming bridal care.

The Tradition Continues

Same Studio. Same Care. New Ownership.

If you found Keepsakes Bridal through an older review, a referral from years ago, or a mention of Sylvia — welcome. You are in the right place. The studio, the address, and the commitment to excellence are exactly as you remember.

What has changed is that Carla — who has been here since the very beginning — is now at the helm. Keepsakes Bridal proudly continues its 30-year tradition of making brides feel beautiful, calm, and absolutely certain on their wedding day.

What We Offer

Couture Services for Your Most Important Gown

Every service at Keepsakes is approached with the same precision and personal care — whether you are preparing for your wedding day or preserving a moment for generations to come.

01

Bridal Gown Alterations

From a precise hem to a complete bodice restructuring, every alteration brings your gown into harmony with your body and your vision.

Learn More →
02

Wedding Gown Preservation

Professional preservation protects delicate fabrics, beading, and lace so your dress remains as beautiful as the memory it holds.

Learn More →
03

Heirloom Redesign

A vintage gown that carries your family’s history deserves a second life. Carla reimagines heirloom gowns into something wearable and meaningful.

Learn More →
04

Custom Formal Wear

For any occasion that calls for something no one else will be wearing. Custom formalwear built precisely for your measurements and style.

Learn More →
05

Custom Lingerie & Bridal Accessories

Handcrafted bridal lingerie, custom veils, hair accessories, and beaded evening purses — finishing details crafted with intention.

Learn More →
06

Formalwear Alterations & Steaming

Prom, pageant, holiday, date night — every gown deserves a perfect fit. Expert alterations plus professional steaming and finishing.

Learn More →

The Keepsakes Difference

Why Sacramento Brides Choose Carla

What sets Keepsakes apart is not just the skill — it is the experience of working with someone who genuinely understands what this moment means to you.

Free Consultation — Always

Come in, bring your gown, and walk through your vision at no cost and no commitment. Carla will assess what is needed and provide a full quote before anything begins.

Calm When It Matters Most

Carla’s approach is intentionally unhurried. She takes time to understand exactly what you want, then delivers results that exceed what you imagined.

30 Years of Studio Excellence

Keepsakes Bridal has served Sacramento brides since 1994. Carla has been part of this studio since 2001 — bringing couture expertise to every gown.

Responsive & Communicative

You will never be left wondering about your gown. Carla is responsive and keeps you informed at every step so you can breathe a little easier.

How It Works

Choose the Appointment That’s Right for You

Every bride’s situation is a little different. Whether you are early in planning or working against a tight timeline, there is a clear path forward.

Always Free

Consultation

No Cost

Bring your gown and your questions. Carla will assess what is needed, talk through your vision, and provide a detailed quote — no pins, no commitment, no pressure.

Schedule a Free Consultation
Most Popular

Fitting Appointment

50% Deposit

Your gown is pinned with precision, your alteration plan is finalized, and your spot on Carla’s calendar is secured with a 50% deposit. Balance collected at pickup.

Book a Fitting Appointment
$50 / hr

Pin-Only Appointment

Applied to Alterations

Precise pinning without committing to a full alteration. $50/hr, typically one hour. Fee applies toward alterations if you proceed with Keepsakes.

Request a Pin-Only Session

Not sure which is right for you? Reach out to Carla directly — she is always happy to talk through the process.

Get In Touch

Let’s Talk About Your Gown

Whether your wedding is six months away or six weeks away, the best time to reach out is now. Carla’s calendar fills quickly during bridal season — and the earlier you connect, the more time and care she can give your gown.

Your first conversation with Carla is always a free consultation — no pins, no commitment, no pressure. Just an honest conversation about your gown, your vision, and what it will take to get there.

Brides travel to Keepsakes from across the Greater Sacramento Area, the Bay Area, Placer County, and surrounding counties.
